name: Swing Kit
explanation: A punchy sampled-style drum kit with SWING in the Akai MPC60 / 3000 lineage. The MPC's two claims to fame are its punchy, slightly saturated drum sound and its legendary timing swing. Swing Kit is a six-voice (kick, snare, closed and open hats, clap, perc) drum machine with a built-in 16-step sequencer: click the on-screen grid to program your own groove. The signature Swing control drags every off-beat 16th late for that head-nodding MPC feel, while Punch boosts the transients and adds a touch of drive. Holding a note runs the pattern; release stops it. Controls: Tune, Decay, Snap, Swing, Punch and Level, plus the step grid.
